title: Shikarpur Heat Wave
lead: Shikarpur is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.31. This anomaly has reached a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Shikarpur has resulted in a high CDD of 14.1 GG, indicating significant cooling degree days. 
 The relative humidity is at 51% and the wind speed is 2.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, meaning there is no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
